calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Room 501A
Judge Pro Tem: James P. Green
Clerk: John Stokes
Reporter: Bob Balian

This cause of action was transferred from Room 218. Plaintiff Abbas Fard was represented by Luis G. Molina, Esq. Defendant Jurgea Heuschkel was present in pro per. A stipulation for entry of judgment was reade on the record. Defendant must vacate the premises at 793 O'Farrell St. #5 by Feb. 28,2003. There are to be no other occupants and no malicious damage to the premises. Plaintiff waives all past and current rents due to Feb. 28,2003. Each party is to bear their own costs. If the defendant complies the Plaintiff will file a dismissal with prejudice. Plaintiff may have a judgment for possession and damages if the defendant does not vacate in a timely manner and may ask for reasonable attorney's fees.
